01.title: Web Machines
01.body: 22 high-capacity web offset towers engineered for large-volume education and commercial printing. Capable of producing millions of printed forms every day, delivering exceptional speed, consistency, and colour accuracy. Multiple cut-off configurations provide flexibility for textbooks, trade books, workbooks, newspapers, and other publications.
01.caption: Web Towers, Press Hall
highlights: millions of printed forms every day

02.title: Sheetfed Machines
02.body: 6 state-of-the-art sheetfed presses: 1 × Eight-colour perfecting press, 5 × Four-colour presses. Featuring premium technology from Komori and Ryobi, enabling outstanding print quality for covers, coffee table books, children's books, packaging, diaries, annual reports, and premium commercial printing.
02.caption: Sheet-Fed Presses, Taloja

03.title: Binding and Finishing
03.body: An integrated post-press line built for speed, durability and precision, with perfect binding, saddle stitching, section sewing and case making, binding millions of high-quality books every year.
03.caption: Binding Line, Navi Mumbai
highlights: perfect binding, saddle stitching, section sewing and case making
millions of high-quality books every year

intro.heading: Infrastructure
intro.body: Spread across 300,000 sq ft in Navi Mumbai, India.

04.title: Warehousing
04.body: Our modern warehousing and logistics infrastructure supports efficient inventory management and global distribution: High-capacity storage for paper, finished goods, and customer inventory. Secure stock management. Order consolidation and kitting. Export-ready packing. Efficient dispatch and last-mile distribution coordination.

05.title: Head Office
05.body: Our corporate headquarters brings together leadership, customer service, design, finance, procurement, and project management under one roof in the heart of the city of Navi Mumbai. 200+ professionals. Contemporary collaborative workspaces. Dedicated client meeting rooms. In-house café and employee collaboration areas. Technology-enabled offices supporting seamless communication with customers across the globe.

binding.title: Binding and Finishing
binding.body: Collating, shrink wrapping, perfect binding, centre pinning, flexi binding and section sewing, across 6 automatic thread sewing machines.

lamination.title: Lamination and Embellishment
lamination.body: Drip lamination, various lamination, embossing and gold foiling.

video.previewAria: Preview facilities walkthrough, video coming soon

people.title: Hands Behind Every Shipment
people.body: Press operators, quality inspectors, kitting teams and logistics specialists, working across shifts, trained to the same standard at every facility.
